name: flutter_devtools_mcp
description: MCP server for Flutter UI automation via DevTools VM Service extensions

FLUTTER_VM_SERVICE_URL.description: VM Service WebSocket URL (ws://127.0.0.1:<port>/ws). Optional — auto-discovered via mDNS if omitted.

tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: Get the current widget tree as LLM-friendly JSON.

tools.name: inspect
tools.description: Get detailed properties of a specific widget node.

tools.name: tap
tools.description: Tap a widget. Selector formats: semantics:Label, key:value_key, text:Content, index:Type:N

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Focus a text field by selector and enter text.

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Scroll a scrollable widget in a direction.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture the current screen as PNG.

tools.name: hot_reload
tools.description: Trigger hot reload on the connected Flutter app.

tools.name: evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate a Dart expression in the running app.

tools.name: press_back
tools.description: Press the system back button / pop the top route.
